message:
refactor(beads): Optimize WASM epic deps and enhance test task descriptions

STRUCTURAL CHANGES:
- Remove overly strict deps from WASM epic (64r) to Syntax (idi) and Table (mfc)
- Add those deps to specific subtasks that actually need them:
  - HTML/CSS output task (on0) now depends on Syntax + Table
  - Demo website task (8f7) now depends on Syntax + Table
- WASM audit (ykf) can now start immediately (8 ready instead of 7)

CONTENT ENHANCEMENTS:
Enhanced these sparse test tasks with comprehensive code examples:
- y3n: Derive macro unit tests (trybuild, edge cases, generics)
- l9q: Table width/alignment tests (Unicode, edge cases, perf)
- 98a: Error type migration tests (creation, display, chaining)
- 4hp: PropTest generator tests (distribution, performance)
- pif: WASM unit tests (wasm-bindgen-test, browser testing)
- 481: Theme unit tests (presets, serialization, runtime)

All test tasks now have:
- Detailed code examples
- Multiple test categories
- Edge case coverage
- Performance requirements
- Logging requirements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
